intro: Pick what you want built next — tell me which numbers to implement and which to skip.

ideas.title: Idle schedule
ideas.desc: Start/stop idling on a daily schedule per account (e.g. only overnight).

ideas.title: Game queue
ideas.desc: Queue multiple games to idle one after another when playtime goals finish.

ideas.title: Rotate games
ideas.desc: Automatically swap idle game every X hours to spread playtime.

ideas.title: Family sharing aware
ideas.desc: Detect shared-library games and warn before idling.

ideas.title: Account groups
ideas.desc: Tag accounts (Main, Alts, Trading) and start/stop by group.

ideas.title: Reconnect dashboard
ideas.desc: One panel showing which accounts are offline, reconnecting, or stuck.

ideas.title: Proxy health check
ideas.desc: Test each proxy before login and mark bad ones.

ideas.title: Import/export accounts
ideas.desc: Backup accounts.txt and tokens in an encrypted file.

ideas.title: Desktop notifications
ideas.desc: Notify when an account drops, reconnects, or hits a playtime goal.

ideas.title: Dark/light theme
ideas.desc: Optional lighter theme for daytime use.

ideas.title: Search everything
ideas.desc: Global search for accounts, games, and log lines.

ideas.title: Playtime charts
ideas.desc: Graph idle hours per account/game from playtime.txt.

ideas.title: Auto-accept gifts
ideas.desc: Optional auto-accept incoming gift licenses (with safelist).

ideas.title: Card farmer mode
ideas.desc: Idle badge/card games with suggested rotation list.

ideas.title: Webhook alerts
ideas.desc: Send Discord/webhook when status changes or errors spike.

ideas.title: Steam maintenance pause
ideas.desc: Pause all bots when Steam scheduled maintenance is detected.

ideas.title: Compact sidebar mode
ideas.desc: Narrow sidebar with icons only for more game space.

ideas.title: Pinned accounts
ideas.desc: Pin favorite accounts to the top of the list.

ideas.title: Bulk game picker
ideas.desc: Select many games from library with filters (never played, under 2h).

ideas.title: Log filters
ideas.desc: Filter All Logs by account, level (info/warn/error), and search.

ideas.title: Steam wishlist deals
ideas.desc: Highlight deals for games on your wishlist.

ideas.title: Achievement tracker
ideas.desc: Show nearly-complete achievements for idle games.

ideas.title: Remote control
ideas.desc: Simple password-protected web link to start/stop from phone.

ideas.title: Multiple instances
ideas.desc: Run separate Monkey Idler profiles with different data folders.
